visualizerParams.title: Tree Mirror Recursion Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The tree mirroring function is only mirroring the first level of the tree. It seems to be failing to process the children nodes recursively. Find and fix the error.

solution.code:
def mirror_tree(tree, root):
    if not root or root not in tree:
        return
    left, right = tree[root][:2]
    tree[root] = [right, left]
    mirror_tree(tree, left)
    mirror_tree(tree, right)
solution.explanation: To mirror the entire tree, the function must be called recursively on the left and right subtrees AFTER swapping them at the current node. The buggy code lacked these recursive calls, so it only swapped the children of the root.
